candidate.question: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Avelumab'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Avelumab';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials studied Avelumab for Head and Neck cancer?

candidate.question: What is the 'Name of ICI' for those trials?
candidate.sql: SELECT "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';
candidate.parent_question: Find Phase 3 Nivolumab trials for renal cell cancer that are follow-up publications?

candidate.question: What is the Name of ICI used in those trials?
candidate.sql: SELECT "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab, Ipilimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;
candidate.parent_question: List trials of Nivolumab and Ipilimumab for Renal cell cancer with overall follow-up exceeding 21 months?
